provenance.source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS)
provenance.notes: Annual median wage (A_MEDIAN) and employment (TOT_EMP) from oesm25ma/MSA_M2025_dl.xlsx and oesm25nat/national_M2025_dl.xlsx. MSA AREA codes matched by AREA_TITLE: Syracuse, NY = 45060; Rochester, NY = 40380. {suppressed:true} = BLS-nondisclosed estimate ('*' wage / '**' employment); {topcoded:true} = wage at or above the OEWS publication top-code ('#'); {absent:true} = occupation not published for that MSA at all.

occupations.title: Electrical and Electronic Engineering Technologists and Technicians
